passcodes.name: Passcode
passcodes.description: Legitimate access credentials. Allows automatic marking of specified nodes without Hacking roll or Overwatch accrual.
passcodes.notes: Rating indicates breadth/restrictiveness of access. Can be as narrow as a single datafile or as broad as an entire host.

programs.name: Analyze
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Search and Render prompt.

programs.name: Armor
programs.description: May be used to soak Overload Damage. Instead of applying damage to Matrix Condition Monitor, degrade Armor on a point-for-point basis.

programs.name: Attack
programs.description: Operational combat program designed to inflict damage upon other icons.

programs.name: Baby Monitor
programs.description: Allows user to get a peek at current Overwatch level. GM relays boxes accrued in terms of wound levels.

programs.name: Biofeedback Filtering
programs.description: May be used to soak Biofeedback Damage on a point-for-point basis.

programs.name: Browse
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing any Index prompts.
programs.associatedPrompt: Index Data Store, Index Subscribed Devices, Index Users and Scheduling

programs.name: Decrypt
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Crack Protections prompt to decode an Encrypted target.
programs.notes: Base Decrypt time = Encryption Rating x 10 minutes.

programs.name: Encrypt
programs.description: Encrypts a target up to the rating of the utility when using Configure Protections prompt.

programs.name: Evasion
programs.description: Allows user to utilize Toggle Visibility prompt to become Hidden, even while currently Link-Locked.

programs.name: Exploit
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Access Node prompt.

programs.name: Jackpot
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Siphon Paydata prompt.

programs.name: Jamboree
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Jam Signal prompt.

programs.name: Kill Switch
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Crack Protections prompt to disarm a Databombed target.
programs.notes: Failure results in self-destruction of target icon.

programs.name: Lock-On
programs.description: Decreases user's TN by rating while using Trace Signal. Even one success establishes a Link-Lock.

programs.name: Medic
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Repair an Icon prompt.

programs.name: Mirrors
programs.description: Decreases user's TN by rating while being scrutinized by System Sweep or Authenticate ability.
programs.notes: Works by spamming fake token icons (falsified records, timestamps).

programs.name: Read/Write
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing any Datafile prompts.
programs.associatedPrompt: Access Datafile, Duplicate/Download Datafile, Edit/Upload Datafile

programs.name: Redirect
programs.description: Increases target number by its rating for enemy icons attempting to target the user with the Trace Signal prompt.

programs.name: Saboteur
programs.description: Databombs an unprotected target up to the rating of the utility when using Configure Protections prompt.

programs.name: Shield
programs.description: Mitigates special IC attacks targeting hardware (MPCP, Memory, utility slots). Degrade Shield instead of hardware.

programs.name: Signal Booster
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing the Send Transmission prompt.

programs.name: Sleaze
programs.description: Allows user to harmlessly pass-through (ignore) any Matrix barrier with rating equal-to or lower than program's current rating.
programs.notes: Degrades by 1 point after each use.

programs.name: Slow
programs.description: Specialized combat program that reduces target icon's Initiative by 3 points per net success instead of staging damage.
programs.notes: Icon crashes if Initiative reduced to 0 within a single turn.

programs.name: Smoke Screen
programs.description: Increases target number by its current rating for enemy icons attempting to target the user with Search and Render.

programs.name: Snoop
programs.description: Decreases the user's target number by its rating while utilizing Tap Datastream or Spoof Datastream prompts.

programs.name: Suppression
programs.description: May be used when crashing an icon. Instead of accruing Overwatch, degrade Suppression to suppress the crash.

protocols.name: Dewormer
protocols.description: Purges a cyberdeck or Matrix enabled device of an Infiltrating IC Agent. Takes hours equal to rating of infiltrator. Can only purge infiltrators up to its rating.

protocols.name: Nexus
protocols.description: Grants priority access to Denver Data Haven. Decreases TN by rating while conducting Matrix legwork or using Etiquette: Matrix.

protocols.name: Shadownet
protocols.description: Grants passcode access to Shadownet LTG. Delays Convergence trace information and physical security response by minutes equal to rating.
